selected_important_turn.text: Would it work for you, then, to give me the three food and three water, and I can give you all of the firewood?
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is the first concrete allocation proposed by YOU and it frames the division as winner-take-most (YOU get all food and water). It strongly signals a zero-sum, competitive frame early in the exchange and sets the baseline for subsequent counteroffers.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: The turn is overly demanding and inflexible: it ignores the opponent's stated top priority (firewood) and offers an all-or-nothing split that leaves little room for tradeoffs. Because it appears to take maximal advantage rather than explore mutual gains, it makes the opponent defensive and pushes the negotiation toward hard positional bargaining.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Shift from an all-or-nothing allocation to an exploratory, integrative stance: acknowledge the opponent's firewood need, ask about flexibility on middle/low items, propose split options or multiple packages (e.g., 'here are two packages we could consider...'), and invite their priorities or constraints before naming a single demanding proposal.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase — more scope for tradeoffs and creative packages if framed collaboratively
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase — proposals that split items or offer multiple options will feel less one-sided
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase — reducing a take-all demand makes it easier for the opponent to reciprocate or counter with reasonable options
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: improve — appearing willing to explore options builds trust and reduces defensiveness

value2reason.Low: warm weather so not much fire needed, some firewood around to pick up
value2reason.Medium: dry, warm weather, much exercise, will need water for drinking, bathing, cleaning
value2reason.High: doing a lot of hiking, mountain biking; lack of convenience grocers

value2reason.Low: I brought a water purifier from home so I can drink from nearby streams.
value2reason.Medium: I am small so I won't need as much food as someone else might.
value2reason.High: I get cold easily and need firewood throughout the night to keep me warm.

dialogue.text: Hello, what are your preferences for extra supplies?  I am greatly in need of food and water.  We will be doing a lot of activity in a hot, dry climate.🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I prefer firewood because I will get cold at night. I forgot blankets ☹️
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Would it work for you, then, to give me the three food and three water, and I can give you all of the firewood?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I’m okay with that, but I need to make sure we both have enough firewood. Let’s split the firewood 2-1, and you take the food and water. That way, I stay warm and you have enough to eat and drink.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I understand your need for firewood. Let's try splitting the firewood 2-1 as you suggested, but I'd like to offer you one package of food and two of water in exchange for two of the firewood. This way, we both
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I think splitting firewood 2-1 is fair, but I’d like to trade one food and two water for one firewood package. That way, I get more warmth, and you have enough food and water for the trip.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I’m okay with trading one food and two water for one firewood package. That way, I get more warmth, and you have enough food and water for the trip.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Okay, let me reevaluate. I’m okay with trading one food and two water for one firewood package. That way, I get more warmth, and you have enough to eat and drink.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Let’s finalize the deal: I’ll take 2 firewood, 1 food, and 2 water. You get 1 firewood, 2 food, and 1 water. This ensures I stay warm and you have enough to eat and drink. Deal?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: The deal has already been confirmed. I am leaving now.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1
